competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Attempt saved. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Alexander Schlager (Austria). Assisted by Álex Baena.

events.description: 亚马尔射正。 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Kevin Danso.
Offside, Austria. Michael Gregoritsch is caught offside.
Attempt blocked. Dani Olmo (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Pedro Porro with a cross.

events.description: 丹尼·奥尔莫射门被封堵。 佩德罗·波罗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Romano Schmid.
Attempt missed. Aymeric Laporte (Spain) header from very close range is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Álex Baena with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 艾默里克·拉波尔特射门偏出。 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: VAR Decision: Other Decision Cancelled.
Foul by David Alaba (Austria).
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Stefan Posch.
Foul by Marc Cucurella (Spain).
Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Pedro Porro (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Pedro Porro (Spain).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Stefan Posch.
Alexander Schlager (Austria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Pau Cubarsí (Spain).
Attempt missed. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the right misses to the left. Assisted by Pau Cubarsí.

events.description: 亚马尔射门偏出。 保罗·库巴尔西参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Alexander Schlager (Austria). Assisted by Dani Olmo.

events.description: 奥亚萨瓦尔射正。 丹尼·奥尔莫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Alexander Schlager.
Offside, Spain. Lamine Yamal is caught offside.
Attempt missed. David Alaba (Austria) left footed shot from outside the box is too high.
Goal! Spain 1, Austria 0. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Marc Cucurella with a cross.

events.description: 奥亚萨瓦尔破门。 比分 1-0。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Lamine Yamal (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Alexander Schlager (Austria). Assisted by Pedro Porro.

events.description: 亚马尔射正。 佩德罗·波罗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Dani Olmo.

events.description: 奥亚萨瓦尔射门被封堵。 丹尼·奥尔莫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Kevin Danso.
Attempt missed. Aymeric Laporte (Spain) left footed shot from more than 35 yards misses to the right. Assisted by Rodri.

events.description: 艾默里克·拉波尔特射门偏出。 罗德里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt blocked. Nicolas Seiwald (Austria) left footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Romano Schmid.

events.description: 尼古拉斯·塞瓦尔德射门被封堵。 罗马诺·施密德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Austria. Michael Gregoritsch is caught offside.
Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Austria. Florian Grillitsch replaces Xaver Schlager.

events.description: 弗洛里安·格里利奇替补登场，换下泽维尔·施拉格。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Austria. Carney Chukwuemeka replaces Nicolas Seiwald.

events.description: 卡尼·楚库梅卡替补登场，换下尼古拉斯·塞瓦尔德。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Spain 1, Austria 0.
Álex Baena (Spain) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Paul Wanner (Austria).
Marc Cucurella (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Álex Baena (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top left corner by Alexander Schlager (Austria).
Attempt saved. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box is saved in the centre of the goal by Alexander Schlager (Austria).
Pedro Porro (Spain) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Delay in match because of an injury Pau Cubarsí (Spain).
Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Alexander Schlager (Austria). Assisted by Rodri.

events.description: 奥亚萨瓦尔射正。 罗德里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Paul Wanner.
Attempt missed. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Álex Baena with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 奥亚萨瓦尔射门偏出。 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Rodri (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Pau Cubarsí.

events.description: 罗德里射门被封堵。 保罗·库巴尔西参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Florian Grillitsch.
Álex Baena (Spain) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt blocked. Álex Baena (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Pedri.

events.description: 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳射门被封堵。 佩德里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Pedro Porro.

events.description: 亚马尔射门被封堵。 佩德罗·波罗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Austria. Marcel Sabitzer is caught offside.
Substitution, Austria. Sasa Kalajdzic replaces Romano Schmid.

events.description: 莎莎·卡拉季奇替补登场，换下罗马诺·施密德。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Austria. Marko Arnautovic replaces Michael Gregoritsch.

events.description: 马尔科·阿诺托维奇替补登场，换下迈克尔·格雷戈里奇。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Sasa Kalajdzic (Austria) header from the centre of the box is just a bit too high. Assisted by Marcel Sabitzer with a cross.

events.description: 莎莎·卡拉季奇射门偏出。 马塞尔·萨比策参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Dani Olmo (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Lamine Yamal.

events.description: 丹尼·奥尔莫射门被封堵。 亚马尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Spain. Lamine Yamal is caught offside.
Unai Simón (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 马尔科·阿诺托维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Marko Arnautovic (Austria).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt blocked. Dani Olmo (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Álex Baena.

events.description: 丹尼·奥尔莫射门被封堵。 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Spain 2, Austria 0. Pedro Porro (Spain) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Álex Baena.

events.description: 佩德罗·波罗破门。 比分 2-0。

qualifiers.espnText: Aymeric Laporte (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Álex Baena.

events.description: 费兰·托雷斯替补登场，换下阿莱克斯·巴埃纳。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Dani Olmo.

events.description: 米克尔·梅里诺替补登场，换下丹尼·奥尔莫。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Mikel Merino (Spain) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Rodri (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 马尔科·阿诺托维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Marc Cucurella (Spain).
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Stefan Posch.
Attempt missed. Ferran Torres (Spain) header from the right side of the box is too high. Assisted by Lamine Yamal with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 费兰·托雷斯射门偏出。 亚马尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Carney Chukwuemeka (Austria) right footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses the top right corner. Assisted by Marko Arnautovic.

events.description: 卡尼·楚库梅卡射门偏出。 马尔科·阿诺托维奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Mikel Merino (Spain).
Attempt missed. Stefan Posch (Austria) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Marcel Sabitzer with a cross.

events.description: 斯特凡·波斯射门偏出。 马塞尔·萨比策参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Marc Cucurella (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Stefan Posch (Austria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Attempt blocked. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Pedro Porro.

events.description: 亚马尔射门被封堵。 佩德罗·波罗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain).
Substitution, Spain. Gavi replaces Lamine Yamal.

events.description: 加维替补登场，换下亚马尔。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Austria. Alexander Prass replaces Stefan Posch.

events.description: 亚历山大·普拉斯替补登场，换下斯特凡·波斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Austria. Marko Arnautovic is caught offside.
Offside, Austria. Marko Arnautovic is caught offside.
Goal! Spain 3, Austria 0. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Marc Cucurella.

events.description: 奥亚萨瓦尔破门。 比分 3-0。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Pedri (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 弗洛里安·格里利奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Spain. Fabián Ruiz replaces Pedri.

events.description: 法比安·鲁伊斯替补登场，换下佩德里。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Spain. Marc Pubill replaces Aymeric Laporte.

events.description: 马克·普比尔替补登场，换下艾默里克·拉波尔特。

qualifiers.espnText: Gavi (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Ferran Torres (Spain) right footed shot from the right side of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Pedro Porro.

events.description: 费兰·托雷斯射门偏出。 佩德罗·波罗参与进攻。
